name: shell_preferences
title: Shell Preferences
description: Per-user shell settings; the record id is the user id.

fields.name: tools
fields.label: AI Tools
fields.help: Comma-separated MCP tool names offered to the model

fields.name: voice_enabled
fields.label: Voice
fields.help: Speak AI replies aloud and enable the mic button (/voice toggles)

fields.name: talk_wake_word
fields.label: Talk Wake Word
fields.help: Talk page: word that arms conversation-mode capture; empty captures everything while the mic is on

fields.name: talk_end_word
fields.label: Talk End Word
fields.help: Talk page: trailing word that ends and submits an utterance; empty disables end-word submission

fields.name: talk_endpoint
fields.label: Talk Endpoint Mode
fields.help: How Talk decides an utterance is finished: silence (VAD), word (end word only), or manual (button/Enter only)

fields.name: talk_silence_ms
fields.label: Talk Silence Endpoint (ms)
fields.help: Talk page: milliseconds of sustained quiet that ends an utterance in silence endpoint mode

fields.name: talk_tts
fields.label: Voice Engine
fields.help: Which engine speaks AI replies: auto prefers an on-device browser voice when one is available and falls back to the server otherwise, server always uses server TTS (with a browser fallback on failure), browser always uses the browser's own speechSynthesis
